packages.name: weather-widgets
packages.author: John Giatropoulos
packages.description: A collection of weather and forecast widgets for your dashboard. Displays current conditions, weekly forecasts, and severe weather alerts.

widgets.name: CurrentWeather
widgets.description: Shows current weather conditions including temperature, humidity, and wind speed.

widgets.name: WeeklyForecast
widgets.description: Weekly weather forecast with daily high/low temperatures and conditions.

widgets.name: WeatherAlerts
widgets.description: Displays active severe weather alerts for your area.

packages.name: productivity-suite
packages.author: DashContrib
packages.description: Essential productivity widgets including a Pomodoro timer, task tracker, and note-taking widget.

widgets.name: PomodoroTimer
widgets.description: A customizable Pomodoro technique timer with session tracking.

widgets.name: TaskTracker
widgets.description: Simple task management with priorities and due dates.

packages.name: dev-tools
packages.author: John Giatropoulos
packages.description: Widgets for developers including GitHub activity feed, CI/CD status, and API health monitoring.

widgets.name: GitHubActivity
widgets.description: Shows recent GitHub activity including commits, PRs, and issues.

widgets.name: CIStatus
widgets.description: Monitor CI/CD pipeline status across your repositories.

widgets.name: ApiHealthMonitor
widgets.description: Monitor API endpoint health with uptime tracking and response time graphs.
